title: MikroTik RouterBOARD RB5009UPr+S+OUT
description: RB5009UPr+S+OUT is a high performance PoE router that comes with passive cooling , IP66 outdoor chassis and high performance (60 - 90% higher than RB4011) which is due to the 64-bit ARM architecture of the processor with a clock speed of 1400 MHz, 1GB RAM type DDR4 and 1GB NAND storage. The router has 7x Gigabit LAN, 1x 2.5Gbit LAN with PoE IN and PoE OUT (802.3af/at) on all eight Ethernet ports with a total PoE budget of 130 W, DC terminal block (24 .. 57V DC), 1Ã SFP+ slot and 1Ã USB 3.0.… Powerful device with PoE and ARM 64bit architecture CPU 1400 MHz, 4 cores, 1 GB RAM, 1 GB NAND 2 types of power supply - DC terminal block, PoE (24 to 57 V DC) PoE IN and PoE out on all eight Ethernet ports! (PoE OUT works only if powered by DC terminal block) Passive cooling without fans Interfaces: (7) Gigabit, (1) 2.5Gigabit, (1) SFP/SFP+, (1) USB 3.0 RouterOS L5 version 7 pre-installed Outdoor chassis with IP66 protection Device Screws, dowels, metal clips (2) metal zip ties
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Multiple WAN Yes LAN speed (7) 10/100/1000Mbps + (1) 100M/1G/2.5G Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (1) 1/10Gbps USB Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at, 24 .. 57V DC Power type PoE, DC connector, DC terminal PoE Input ports 8 PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at, Passive 24V, Passive 48V PoE Out ports 8 PoE budget [W] 130 Max. power consumption [W] 15 Power via connector/terminal 24 .. 57V DC Physical characteristics Design Outdoor Fans No Chassis design Metal Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 222 Height [mm] 239 Depth [mm] 57 Hardware CPU 88F7040 CPU frequency [MHz] 1400 CPU cores 4 Internal storage [MB] 1024 RAM [MB] 1024
